falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern typically featured shallow, V-shaped recoveries with no retest of lows; a break below 4950 would violate the structural floor of that pattern and indicate this is not a genuine bottom formation but rather a bear market rally failing

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom saw VIX spike and rapidly collapse; sustained elevated fear above 35 indicates persistent de-risking incompatible with the 'blowoff' reversal dynamics and suggests capitulation has not completed

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield falls below 3.80% and stays there for 3+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained flight-to-quality bid in bonds at these levels would signal growth scare or financial stress dominance, invalidating the reflation/recovery mechanics embedded in the bottom_2024_aug analog where yields stabilized or rose

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
